text: ALIT Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Alight, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm. LOS ANGELES, April 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The Schall Law Firm, a national shareholder rights litigation firm, reminds investors of a class action lawsuit against Alight, Inc. ("Alight" or "the Company") (NYSE: ALIT) for violations of §§10(b) and 20(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 and Rule 10b-5 promulgated thereunder by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Investors who purchased the Company's securities between November 12, 2024 and February 18, 2026, inclusive (the "Class Period"), are encouraged to contact the firm before May 15, 2026.
label: negative

text: BSF Enterprise surges 24% as retail veteran takes largest individual stake. BSF Enterprise PLC (LSE:BSFA), the tissue-engineered materials company, jumped 24% to 2.01p after revealing that John Story, chairman and principal shareholder of watch and accessories group Peers Hardy, has acquired a significant interest in the company through its recently completed placing, making him its largest individual shareholder. Peers Hardy is a supplier of watches, jewellery and accessories to major UK high street retailers, with a track record in the design, sourcing and distribution of fashion and premium watches, including both licensed and owned brands.

text: Baker Hughes to sell Waygate unit to Hexagon for $1.45B in cash. Baker Hughes has agreed to sell its Waygate Technologies unit to Swedish industrial technology group Hexagon for approximately $1.45 billion in cash, the companies said on Monday. The transaction, which remains subject to customary closing conditions and regulatory approvals, is expected to be completed in the second half of 2026.
